title: Regulations
doc_html:
§1708.  Regulations

The commissioner of insurance may adopt reasonable rules and regulations as are necessary or proper to carry out the purposes of this Part.

Acts 2006, No. 806, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 22:1210.108 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.

§1708.  Regulations
